description: Pulmonary-focused early questioning for an elderly COPD patient on home oxygen.
source: Added for the 92F pneumonia dynamic-status scenario
questions: Hello, I'm your doctor today. Can you tell me what brought you to the ED?
When did the cough and runny nose start?
Are you bringing up sputum, and has its color changed from your usual sputum?
Have you had fever, chills, wheezing, or shortness of breath today?
Do you use oxygen at home, and was your oxygen level lower than usual?
Do you have chest pain with coughing, nausea, or any vomiting?
